sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_test (id UInt64, pointLow UInt64, pointHigh UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, s2RectAdd(pointLow, pointHigh, s2RectAdd(pointLow, 5179056748191934217, 5179006748191934217)) AS rectAdd FROM geo_test WHERE (pointLow - pointHigh) > 0;
CREATE TABLE geo_extreme (ext_id UInt64, ext_value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY ext_id;
SELECT ext_id, s2RectAdd(0, 0, toUInt64(parseFloat(ext_value))) AS rectAdd FROM geo_extreme WHERE ext_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, s2RectAdd(pointLow, pointHigh, s2Point) FROM geo_test, (SELECT min(pointLow) AS s2Point FROM geo_test) AS subquery WHERE pointLow - (SELECT max(pointHigh) FROM geo_test) < 100;

WITH (SELECT min(pointLow) FROM geo_test) AS minLow, (SELECT max(pointHigh) FROM geo_test) AS maxHigh SELECT s2RectAdd(minLow, maxHigh, 5179006747191934217) AS rectAdd FROM geo_test HAVING rectAdd > 0;
WITH (SELECT count(*) FROM geo_test) AS totalCount SELECT s2RectAdd(pointLow, pointHigh, 5179056748191934217) AS rectAdd, totalCount FROM geo_test HAVING rectAdd > 0 ORDER BY rectAdd DESC;
